executives.name: Dominik Asam
executives.background: Dominik Asam is CFO and a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE. Before joining SAP, he was CFO of Airbus and Infineon Technologies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer / Member of the Executive Committee

executives.name: Grazia Vittadini
executives.background: Former CTO of Airbus and Rolls-Royce. Expert in aerospace and technology.
